subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Beauty of the All-Glorious! The light of truth shineth forth through the glass of oneness from the niche of divine unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حضرت کبریانک مفتون جمال ذوالجلالی نور حقیقت زجاجه احدیت مشکوه واحدیتده
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as mirror, @light and darkness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
